name: openclaw-langgraph-bridge
description: Bridges an OpenClaw agent acting as orchestrator with one or more LangGraph workflows.

langgraphBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the LangGraph server. Phase 1 tool calls fail fast when unset.

callbackToken.description: Shared secret the LangGraph workflow includes on inbound webhook POSTs. Required when the webhook handler is wired in Phase 2.

callbackPublicBaseUrl.description: Public base URL the LangGraph server should POST events to, e.g. http://kit-host:18794. The plugin appends `/plugins/openclaw-langgraph-bridge/events` when dispatching.

agentId.description: Agent id to wake via `openclaw agent` when a LangGraph event requires waking the session-bound agent. Default 'main'.

allowedWorkflows.description: Allowlist of assistant ids / graph ids the agent may dispatch. Empty/unset disables the allowlist.

defaultTimeoutMs.description: Per-request timeout for the LangGraph HTTP client. Default 10000.

summaryMaxChars.description: Maximum characters for event summaries in wake messages. Default 4000.

langgraphApiKey.description: API key for LangSmith Deployment (LangChain's hosted LangGraph). Sent as x-api-key header on all outbound HTTP calls to the LangGraph server. Not required for langgraph dev or self-hosted Aegra deployments.

langgraphAuthScheme.description: Auth scheme sent as x-auth-scheme alongside x-api-key. Required for LangSmith Fleet deployments (value: 'langsmith-api-key'). Leave unset for standard LangSmith Deployment, Aegra, or langgraph dev.
